name: growing-and-gardening-2d
description: Growing and Gardening 2D - A multiplayer gardening game

scripts.ios:dev: cd ios && npx cap run ios
scripts.build:windows: cd client && npx vite build && cd ../windows && npx electron-builder
scripts.build:ios: cd client && npx vite build && cd ../ios && npx cap copy && npx cap sync
